name: tencent-bh
description: OctoBus package for Tencent Cloud T-Sec Bastion Host (堡垒机) session, asset, and user management APIs.

Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/ListSessions.name: list-sessions
Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/ListSessions.description: List Bastion Host sessions with filters.

Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/KillSession.name: kill-session
Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/KillSession.description: Force terminate a Bastion Host session.

Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/LockUser.name: lock-user
Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/LockUser.description: Lock a Bastion Host user account.

Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/UnlockUser.name: unlock-user
Tencent_BH.Tencent_BH/UnlockUser.description: Unlock a Bastion Host user account.
